title: Introduction to Odoo ERP
learning_objectives: Understand what Odoo is and its architecture.
instructions: Watch the introduction video and navigate the interface.
deliverables: Create a summary of Odoo apps.

title: CRM & Lead Management
learning_objectives: Learn how to manage leads, opportunities, and pipelines.
instructions: Create a pipeline, convert a lead, and schedule an activity.
deliverables: Submit a screenshot of your CRM pipeline.

title: Sales & Quotations
learning_objectives: Learn how to create quotation templates and sales orders.
instructions: Configure a product, create a quote, and confirm the sale.
deliverables: Submit a confirmed sales order PDF.
